subject: Patch libgloss._exit to dual-path (sim_control + semihosting)
description: Edit /local/nick/vsim/hybrid/test/runtime/libgloss.c so _exit first writes EXIT_COMMAND_ADDR (vsim path) then issues the RISC-V semihosting SYS_EXIT_EXTENDED ebreak triple (QEMU virt path). Keep _write/HTIF paths as-is.
